ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last date the country's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data source belongs to */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_label" TEXT /* Label of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, research institute) */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Physical location or headquarters of the data source */,
  "source_update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., demographic, health) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source typically providing this data type (e.g., government, research institute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the data point belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data point was collected */,
  "cumulative_total" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of the data point */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the data point belongs to */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the data point belongs to */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data point */,
  "daily_increment" INTEGER /* Daily increment in the cumulative total */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., confirmed, estimated) */,
  "geographical_division" TEXT /* Geographical division within the country (e.g., state, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_leader" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_leader FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the member left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "section_content" TEXT /* Content of the section */,
  "section_status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the section */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sections_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sections_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sections_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
